title: 10 best herbal tinctures for fluid retention
description: Chinese peony tinctures helps with fluid retention because it has a natural diuretic property that helps to remove excess water from the body. The herb's active compounds, including paeoniflorin and glycosides, work together to reduce inflammation in the body and promote urine production, thereby reducing swelling and discomfort caused by fluid buildup.
